name: Do I really need a lawyer for machine finger amputation at work?

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for machine finger amputation at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, boosts payout, handles complexity free upfront.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, insurers lowball 40%+ of claims; lawyers get 20-30% higher settlements free upfront.[3][1] They handle denials, third-party suits.[6] Key factors: No win no fee; expertise in machine cases. DIY risks mistakes.

description: Yes, boosts payout, handles complexity free upfront.
